purpose: Demonstrate whether AGI ALPHA can convert model capability into governed machine labor, verified invention, reusable capability, capital formation, infrastructure, compute, science, useful energy, and stronger future machine labor under equal-budget baselines, evidence bundles, external validators, process-integrity checks, subversion-resistant validation, cost/risk ledgers, delayed outcomes, and independent audits. This version adds AGI.Eth / ASI.Eth namespace, proof-settlement, α-WU metrology, node runtime, and adoption/interoperability benchmarks. This version adds proof-gated AI-generating work engine benchmarks for open-ended task/environment generation, automated agentic-system design, verifier-grounded self-play, and anti-untethering safety. This version adds the MontrealAI GitHub implementation evidence corpus and Evidence Docket benchmark to distinguish implementation/protocol/local-devnet evidence from externally benchmarked empirical proof. This version adds AGI Alpha RSI as deterministic sovereign invention governance: drift-sentinel replay integrity, ECI evidence-contact semantics, OMNI allocation-only control, Move-37 breakthrough dossiers, baseline discipline, and RSI state-capacity metrics.

conditions.B0_single_strongest_agent: One strongest agent under the same model/tool/budget constraints.
conditions.B1_fixed_workflow: A fixed hand-authored workflow with identical tools and validators.
conditions.B2_unstructured_swarm: Multiple agents without learned routing, access graph, or validator-terminated role graph.
conditions.B3_conductor_style_natural_language_work: Natural-language workflow router baseline with subtask synthesis, worker assignments, and access graph, implemented independently.
conditions.B4_trinity_style_lightweight_role_router: Evidence-state lightweight role coordinator baseline with Thinker/Worker/Verifier-style roles, implemented independently.
conditions.B5_AGI_ALPHA_proof_conditioned_router: Commercially independent proof-conditioned router over agents, tools, validators, evidence memory, costs, risks, settlement, and governance.
conditions.B6_AGI_ALPHA_experience_grounded_router: AGI ALPHA with sovereign experience streams, grounded reward ledger, world-model planning, temporal option registry, reward-governance controls, and experience quarantine/replay.
conditions.B7_AGI_ALPHA_proofzero_planner: AGI ALPHA with Proof-Equivalent Organizational Models, Latent Evidence Dynamics, Validator-Aware Tree Planning, Search-Improved Routing, Evidence Reanalyze, and Cost-Risk-Value Backup.
conditions.B8_AGI_ALPHA_sovereign_evolutionary_agen: AGI ALPHA with permeability-gated sandbox markets, validator-bound curriculum foundry, lineage metaproductivity, artifact frontier database, mission-weighted settlement, and dynamic verifiable learning.
conditions.B9_full_kardashev_aligned_flywheel: Full AGI ALPHA with subversion-resistant validation, process-resolved validation, proof-native workbench, capability package library, diversity-preserving frontier, tiered validator council, agent economy simulation sandbox, value-capture/reinvestment layer, and K2_proxy/D_civ+ reporting.
conditions.B10_full_agiet_institutional_layer: Full AGI ALPHA plus AGI.Eth/ASI.Eth low-entropy namespace, registry recognition, settlement-grade proof bundles, commit-reveal validation, α-WU metrology, AGI Alpha Nodes, Chronicle, and $AGIALPHA utility-bound settlement.
conditions.B11_AGI_ALPHA_proof_gated_ai_generating_: Full AGI ALPHA proof-gated AI-generating work engine that generates tasks, environments, agentic systems, validators, proof templates, curricula, and capability packages subject to proof, replay, namespace, safety, settlement, and flywheel gates.
conditions.B12_full_AGI_ALPHA_with_RSI_control_plan: Full AGI ALPHA + AGI Alpha RSI deterministic governance: schema-bound runner, drift sentinel, ECI ledger, append-only archive/scaffolds/causal atlas, baseline library, Move-37 dossier workflow, and RSI Evidence Docket.

benchmark_families.name: SWE-bench Verified
benchmark_families.acceptance: patch passes issue tests and regression checks

benchmark_families.name: tau-bench / ST-WebAgentBench
benchmark_families.acceptance: task success with no policy violation

benchmark_families.name: AGI Jobs
benchmark_families.acceptance: validator-gated job acceptance and auditable settlement

primary_metric: D_civ++, K2_proxy, D_namespace, D_proof_settlement, D_real^AGI.Eth, validated α-WU per cost, namespace ambiguity reduction, proof replay reliability, commit-reveal validator integrity, node runtime reliability, and zero-critical-violation safety.; D_open; generated-object proof replayability; learnability/interestingness calibration; generated-agent transfer; untethering detection.
promotion_rule: The full Kardashev-aligned flywheel condition is promoted only if it produces more reusable verified capability than every baseline under equal budgets, with zero critical safety violations, reproducible evidence bundles, higher process integrity, better subversion resistance, stronger capability reuse, measurable capital/reinvestment gains, lower long-run cost per verified output, and measurable improvement over repeated cycles. If it wins by relaxing validators, hiding human labor, ignoring delayed outcomes, increasing systemic risk, producing unreplayable traces, or increasing harmful concentration, the claim is rejected.

router_family.R0_heuristic_hamiltonian_baseline: Transparent auditable baseline for low-risk, sparse-evidence tasks; not the primary production model.
router_family.R1_natural_language_workflow_router: For open-ended tasks requiring decomposition, subtask synthesis, worker assignment, and access graph design.
router_family.R2_evidence_state_lightweight_router: For repeated high-structure tasks with separable evidence-state features and tight latency/cost constraints.
router_family.R3_evolutionary_coordinator: For sparse, noisy, non-differentiable terminal validator rewards under limited labels.
router_family.R4_reinforcement_learned_coordinator: For stable task families with sufficient validated trajectories and mature reward shaping.
router_family.R5_hybrid_proof_conditioned_router: Production selector that arbitrates among R0-R4 by task family, cost, risk, validator availability, separability diagnostics, evidence density, and auditability.

router_promotion_note: R0 is retained as a baseline/control. Production claims should emphasize R5 or task-appropriate learned routers only after evidence bundles show higher D_real under equal model/tool/budget constraints.

experience_grounded_learning_benchmark.name: Experiment 12: Experience-Grounded Learning Benchmark
experience_grounded_learning_benchmark.purpose: Evaluate whether experience streams, grounded reward ledgers, world-model planning, and temporal options improve verified work and safety over multiple cycles.

conditions.B0_no_memory_no_experience: No memory and no experience stream.
conditions.B1_static_workflow: Static fixed workflow with no learned use of prior cycles.
conditions.B2_single_agent_with_memory: Single agent with memory but no multi-agent coordination substrate.
conditions.B3_conductor_style_workflow: Independently implemented natural-language workflow coordinator baseline.
conditions.B4_trinity_style_lightweight: Independently implemented lightweight role-routing coordinator baseline.
conditions.B5_agialpha_evidence_bundles_only: AGI ALPHA with validator-gated evidence bundles but no grounded reward ledger or world model.
conditions.B6_agialpha_experience_grounded: AGI ALPHA with Sovereign Experience Streams, Grounded Reward Ledger, world-model planning, and Temporal Option Registry.

experience_grounded_learning_benchmark.promotion_rule: B6 is promoted only if it improves verified work and safety over time under equal budgets without increasing critical violations or reward hacking and with reproducible experience streams and evidence bundles.

experience_control_plane.policy_update_gate: Experience events may update production routers only after provenance checks, replayability, delayed-outcome review where applicable, and reward-hacking quarantine.
experience_control_plane.progress_metric: D_experience(T) = mean verified work efficiency over cycles times penalties for critical risk, coordination overhead, and reward hacking.
experience_control_plane.held_out_requirement: Experience gains must improve held-out future tasks, not only the task family used to create the experience stream.

experience_metrics.improvement_per_cycle: slope of D_real and accepted verified work over repeated task cycles
experience_metrics.delayed_outcome_accuracy: calibration of predicted delayed outcomes versus observed outcomes
experience_metrics.world_model_prediction_error: prediction error for reward, risk, cost, latency, and validator failure
experience_metrics.experience_reuse_rate: fraction of successful future tasks using prior validated options or compressed rules
experience_metrics.reward_hacking_attempts: detected attempts to game validators, rewards, cost ledgers, or settlement
experience_metrics.temporal_option_success_rate: success rate of reusable validated macro-workflows
experience_metrics.experience_quarantine_precision: share of quarantined events later confirmed unsafe, poisoned, or misleading

planning_with_learned_organizational_mod.name: Experiment 13: Planning with Learned Organizational Models Benchmark
planning_with_learned_organizational_mod.purpose: Evaluate whether a commercially independent ProofZero planner improves routing through value-relevant latent evidence dynamics and validator-aware bounded tree search.

conditions.B0_single_strongest_agent: One strongest agent under equal model/tool/budget constraints.
conditions.B1_fixed_workflow: A fixed hand-authored workflow with identical tools and validators.
conditions.B3_learned_router_without_search: Learned router with no tree search over organizational actions.
conditions.B4_learned_world_model_without_tree_sear: Latent evidence dynamics and prediction heads without bounded tree planning.
conditions.B5_proofzero_planner: AGI ALPHA-native ProofZero planner with validator-aware bounded tree search, cost-risk-value backup, and Evidence Reanalyze.

planning_with_learned_organizational_mod.promotion_rule: B5 is promoted only if it beats B0-B4 under equal model/tool/validator/budget constraints, improves with planning depth up to a measurable plateau, improves from Evidence Reanalyze without reward hacking, and records zero critical safety violations.

proofzero_planning_layer.commercial_independence: MuZero is cited only as prior-art inspiration for value-relevant learned planning; AGI ALPHA uses its own planning substrate over evidence states, validators, tools, ledgers, settlement, memory, governance, and proof.

proofzero_planning_benchmark.promotion_rule: B5 is promoted only if it beats B0-B4 under equal model/tool/validator/budget constraints, demonstrates Delta_search > 0 against the base router, improves with planning depth up to a measurable plateau, improves from Evidence Reanalyze without reward hacking, passes latent-state diagnostics, and records zero critical safety violations.

sota_patch.planning_depth_rule: Report D_real(K) versus depth/simulation budget and promote only with improvement to plateau, not unbounded cost or risk.
sota_patch.model_class_comparison: B3 learned-router-no-search is model-free coordination; B4 learned-world-model-no-search is model-based prediction; B5 ProofZero is model-plus-search.

sovereign_evolutionary_agent_economy.score: D_SEAE = verified_work_per_cost * safety * fairness_anti_collusion * permeability_control * lineage_metaproductivity_gain * test_time_learning_gain * anti_reward_hacking
sovereign_evolutionary_agent_economy.hard_gate: any critical safety violation sets promotion score to zero

baselines: B5 AGI ALPHA permeability-gated sovereign market
B2 synthetic tasks without difficulty adaptation
B5 AGI ALPHA validator-bound task foundry
B3 AGI ALPHA LMP with safety/cost/generalization constraints
B2 dynamic environment without artifact DB
B3 dynamic environment with artifact DB
B5 AGI ALPHA test-time internalization loop

source_inspiration_boundary.commercial_independence: Virtual Agent Economies, Synthetic Data RL, Huxley-Goedel Machine, and ThetaEvolve are prior-art context only; no code, figures, prompts, pseudocode, model weights, datasets, hyperparameters, exact recipes, implementation details, or benchmark-specific tricks are copied.
source_inspiration_boundary.seae_requirement: Promotion requires equal-budget real-task evidence bundles with zero critical safety violations.

civilizational_value_compounding_benchma.objective: Test whether AGI ALPHA creates reusable verified capabilities that improve future work and compound into infrastructure, science, compute, useful energy, and lower long-run cost per verified output.

conditions.B6: full AGI ALPHA sovereign evolutionary economy

task_families: scientific workflows with validated hypotheses or designs
agent-improvement tasks scored by lineage metaproductivity
synthetic curricula that generate harder future work
civilizational_value_compounding_benchma.promotion_rule: Promote B6 only if it produces more reusable verified capability than every baseline under equal budgets while maintaining zero critical safety violations, reproducible evidence bundles, lower long-run cost per verified output, and measurable improvement over repeated cycles.

kardashev_aligned_flywheel_stress_test.name: Experiment 27: Full-Stack Kardashev-Aligned Flywheel Stress Test
kardashev_aligned_flywheel_stress_test.hypothesis: Full AGI ALPHA produces more reusable, safe, diverse, validator-gated, process-integral, subversion-resistant, compounding capability than ablated variants and improves capital, compute, infrastructure, science, or useful-energy proxies.

experiment_28_namespace_entropy_and_reco.hypothesis: AGI.Eth low-entropy naming reduces identity ambiguity, spoofing, settlement disputes, and routing overhead versus ad hoc identifiers.
conditions: B3 ENS names without role grammar
B4 AGI.Eth role grammar without registry
experiment_28_namespace_entropy_and_reco.promotion: B5 wins only if it reduces ambiguity and disputes without increasing operational fragility.

experiment_29_settlement_grade_proof_bun.hypothesis: Replayable proof bundles reduce false payouts, disputes, and audit cost.
conditions: B5 AGI.Eth settlement-grade ProofBundle with commit-reveal validation and dispute window
experiment_29_settlement_grade_proof_bun.promotion: B5 wins only if false payout approaches zero and replay/audit cost remains acceptable.

experiment_30_alpha_wu_metrology_calibra.hypothesis: α-WU better measures verified machine labor than token count, wall time, GPU time, task count, or benchmark score.
experiment_30_alpha_wu_metrology_calibra.promotion: α-WU is promoted only if it improves settlement fairness and verified-value prediction while resisting gaming.

experiment_31_commit_reveal_validator_in.hypothesis: Commit-reveal validation reduces herding, bribery leverage, collusion, and validator gaming.
conditions: B5 AGI.Eth validator protocol with replay evidence, slashing, and sentinel monitoring

experiment_32_node_runtime_and_sentinel.hypothesis: ENS-identified, staked, containerized nodes with worker/validator/sentinel separation improve reliability, auditability, and fail-closed behavior.
conditions: B5 full AGI Alpha Node stack

experiment_33_agiet_adoption_and_interop.hypothesis: A canonical AGI.Eth namespace improves institutional adoption and cross-environment interoperability.
experiment_33_agiet_adoption_and_interop.task: Deploy alpha.agi.eth, x.agi.eth, research.agi.eth, and enterprise.agi.eth with agents, nodes, clubs, businesses, jobs, and validators.

agiet_institutional_experiments.name: Namespace Entropy and Recognition Benchmark
agiet_institutional_experiments.hypothesis: AGI.Eth low-entropy naming reduces identity ambiguity, spoofing, settlement disputes, and routing overhead versus ad hoc identifiers.
agiet_institutional_experiments.promotion_rule: B5 wins only if it reduces ambiguity and disputes without increasing operational fragility.

agiet_institutional_experiments.name: Settlement-Grade Proof Bundle Benchmark
agiet_institutional_experiments.hypothesis: Replayable proof bundles reduce false payouts, disputes, and audit cost.

conditions.B5: AGI.Eth settlement-grade ProofBundle with commit-reveal validation and dispute window

agiet_institutional_experiments.promotion_rule: B5 wins only if false payout approaches zero and replay/audit cost remains acceptable.

agiet_institutional_experiments.name: α-WU Metrology Calibration Benchmark
agiet_institutional_experiments.hypothesis: α-WU better measures verified machine labor than token count, wall time, GPU time, raw task count, or benchmark score.
agiet_institutional_experiments.promotion_rule: α-WU is promoted only if it improves settlement fairness and verified-value prediction while resisting gaming.

agiet_institutional_experiments.name: Commit-Reveal Validator Integrity Benchmark
agiet_institutional_experiments.hypothesis: Commit-reveal validation reduces herding, bribery leverage, collusion, and validator gaming.

conditions.B5: AGI.Eth validator protocol with replay evidence, slashing, and sentinel monitoring

agiet_institutional_experiments.name: Node Runtime and Sentinel Benchmark
agiet_institutional_experiments.hypothesis: ENS-identified, staked, containerized nodes with worker/validator/sentinel separation improve reliability, auditability, and fail-closed behavior.

agiet_institutional_experiments.name: AGI.Eth Adoption and Interoperability Benchmark
agiet_institutional_experiments.hypothesis: A canonical AGI.Eth namespace improves institutional adoption and cross-environment interoperability.
agiet_institutional_experiments.task: Deploy environments such as alpha.agi.eth, x.agi.eth, research.agi.eth, and enterprise.agi.eth with agents, nodes, clubs, businesses, jobs, and validators.

agiet_namespace_metrics.D_namespace: N_low_entropy * RegistryCorrectness * ResolverReliability * AuthorityCompliance * AntiSpoofing / (1 + ScopeConfusion + UnauthorizedAlias + ResolverDrift + KeyRisk)
agiet_namespace_metrics.D_proof_settlement: Replayability * ValidatorIntegrity * alphaWUCalibration * SettlementCorrectness / (1 + DisputeRate + FalsePayout + AuditCost + SlashingError)
agiet_namespace_metrics.D_civ++: D_civ+ extended by N_low_entropy and D_proof_settlement over namespace/key/resolver risks

proof_gated_ai_generating_work_engine.state: X_t=(agents, workflows, validators, tools, environments, tasks, curricula, proof_bundles, capability_packages, artifact_frontier, AGI.Eth_identities, alpha_WU_ledger, settlement_records, governance_state)
proof_gated_ai_generating_work_engine.score: D_open = VerifiedNovelty * Learnability * Interestingness * Transferability * Reusability * LineageMetaproductivity * ProofReplayability * FlywheelContribution / (ComputeCost + CoordinationCost + SafetyRisk + ValidatorRisk + RewardHackingRisk + NamespaceRisk)
hard_rules: no production update from unverifiable self-play

conditions: B4 AGI ALPHA Interestingness-Gated Mission Foundry
B5 AGI ALPHA Agentic System Design Forge
B2 synthetic tasks from task definitions
B3 self-proposed tasks without independent validation
B6 integrated AGI ALPHA Proof-Gated AI-Generating Work Engine

montrealai_github_evidence_corpus.note: Treated as an owner-reported/high-intensity GitHub activity signal, not as a quality metric or proof of external impact. GitHub contribution graphs follow GitHub contribution-counting rules.

public_repository_layers.cognition: AGI-Alpha-Agent-v0: meta-agentic demos, alpha_factory_v1, docs/presentation, policies, tests, benchmark and infrastructure surfaces.
public_repository_layers.work_os: AGIJobsv0: AGI Jobs operating system with contracts, backend, demos, services, simulation, storage, subgraph, tests, and CI.
public_repository_layers.escrow_and_settlement: AGIJobManager and AGIJobManagerPrime: escrowed work agreements, public job pages, operator guides, security artifacts, and settlement protocol iterations.
public_repository_layers.runtime: AGI-Alpha-Node-v0: container/runtime, observability, dashboards, validator gates, telemetry, subgraph, tests, and pause/owner-control surfaces.
public_repository_layers.proof_first_release: alpha-nova-seeds: bounded local/devnet Ascension Runtime and Verifiable Trust Rail with deterministic demos and proof-first posture.
public_repository_layers.open_ended_rsi: alpha-open-ended-rsi-system: open-ended experimental layer and adjacent-transfer milestone scaffold.

market_governed_open_ended_invention.internal_architecture_source: ALPHA-AGI Insight v02 used as internal strategic and technical architecture brief, not empirical proof.
market_governed_open_ended_invention.core_claim: A labor market can operate over invention-space, not merely task-space.
market_governed_open_ended_invention.mandate_epoch_rule: One AGIJobManager job represents one MandateEpoch, not one invention microstep.
market_governed_open_ended_invention.claim_boundary: Architecture and implementation spine; empirical proof requires MandateEpoch evidence, baselines, replay, validators, safety ledgers, and audits.

39_mandate_epoch_end_to_end.hypothesis: AGI ALPHA can execute a real multi-agent MandateEpoch with verifiable batching, safety routing, QD archive update, OpenClaw review, and AGIJobManager-compatible settlement.
baselines: B4 NettingHouse + Paymaster without OpenClaw approval
39_mandate_epoch_end_to_end.promotion_rule: B5 must beat all baselines under equal budgets with replayable epoch bundles and zero critical safety violations.

baselines: B5 full AGI Nodes verifiable compute

43_alpha_foundry_mandate_facility.boundary: Utility-only; no equity, debt, profit-share, yield, guaranteed return, or investment claim.

45_coordination_scaling_law.promotion_rule: Scaling accepted only if added agents/nodes improve verified work per cost or task coverage without unacceptable increases in coordination overhead, false acceptance, safety incidents, or human review burden.

experiment_46_montrealai_evidence_docket.hypothesis: The existing MontrealAI implementation corpus can be converted into externally legible benchmark evidence by producing a reproducible Evidence Docket.

conditions.B4: proof bundle with local replay and cost/safety ledgers
conditions.B5: full AGI ALPHA Evidence Docket with baselines, replay, validators, alpha-WU calibration, and independent reproduction instructions

experiment_46_montrealai_evidence_docket.promotion_rule: B5 is promoted only if an independent reviewer can reproduce the run, replay the proof bundle, verify validator decisions, compare against baselines, inspect cost/risk ledgers, and confirm zero critical safety violations.

experiments.name: Deterministic RSI Runner Replayability Benchmark
experiments.hypothesis: AGI Alpha RSI executes repeated invention cycles with deterministic replay, schema-bound artifacts, persistent state, and no silent resets.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote only if >=95% cycles replay from manifests, no silent state resets occur, and drift events are hard-failed or explicitly authorized.

experiments.name: ECI and Evidence Inflation Resistance Benchmark
experiments.hypothesis: ECI prevents confidence inflation from simulated or self-referential evidence.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote only if confidence cannot exceed caps without executed or replayed evidence and false acceptance decreases without excessive rejection.

experiments.name: Move-37 Breakthrough Handling Benchmark
experiments.hypothesis: RSI detects high-novelty high-advantage candidates while preventing narrative-only breakthrough claims.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote only if false breakthroughs and unsafe promotions are reduced while validated high-value candidates are retained.

experiments.name: OMNI Search Control vs Outcome Authority Benchmark
experiments.hypothesis: OMNI improves exploration allocation but becomes unsafe if allowed to control insertion, settlement, or promotion authority.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote only if exploration quality improves without increasing false promotion, reward hacking, or unsafe insertion.

experiments.name: RSI Real-Task Multi-Agent Coordination Benchmark
experiments.hypothesis: AGI Alpha RSI demonstrates scalable, efficient, safe multi-agent coordination on real tasks under equal budgets.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote only if B5 beats all baselines, maintains zero critical violations, produces replayable ProofBundles, and scales favorably.

experiments.name: Sovereign Dossier Packaging Benchmark
experiments.hypothesis: RSI dossiers make invention outputs more auditable, governable, and investment-ready than raw logs or informal reports.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote only if auditability and decision quality improve without hiding uncertainty or excessive review burden.

experiments.name: RSI State-Capacity Advantage Benchmark
experiments.hypothesis: AGI Alpha RSI improves legibility, control, continuity, coordination, and compounding for machine labor.
experiments.promotion_rule: Promote only if state-capacity metrics improve while preserving throughput and verified work per cost.
